name: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc.
description: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. is a leading, less-than-truckload (LTL) multi-regional motor carrier that provides regional, inter-regional, and national LTL services through a single integrated organization. The company's service offerings, which include expedited transportation, are provided through an expansive network of service centers located throughout the continental United States. Beyond its core LTL services, the company offers a range of value-added services including container drayage, truckload brokerage, and supply chain consulting, maintaining a strong reputation for service reliability and efficiency.

investment_theses.company_type: Logistics / Less-Than-Truckload Shipping for US Mfg
